question: What are the names of all child diseases of 'Mendelian disease'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease) RETURN child.node_name AS child_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease)
RETURN child.node_name AS child_disease_name

question: Which phenotypes are present in the disease 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) RETURN p.node_name AS phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)
RETURN p.node_name AS phenotype_name, p.node_id AS phenotype_id

question: What is the node_id of the disease called 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'}) RETURN d.node_id AS node_id
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})
RETURN d.node_id

question: Return the node_source and node_index of the gene/protein 'BRCA2'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (gp:gene__protein {node_name: 'BRCA2'}) RETURN gp.node_source AS source, gp.node_index AS node_index
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (g:gene__protein {node_name: 'BRCA2'})
RETURN g.node_source, g.node_index

question: How many drugs are indicated for 'hereditary breast carcinoma'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:indication]->(dr:drug) RETURN count(dr) AS total_indicated_drugs
candidate_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})<-[:indication]-(dr:drug) RETURN count(dr) AS drug_count

question: Find all diseases that share at least one phenotype with 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)<-[:disease_phenotype_positive]-(d2:disease) WHERE d2.node_name <> 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome' RETURN DISTINCT d2.node_name AS related_disease, p.node_name AS shared_phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)<-[:disease_phenotype_positive]-(d2:disease)
WHERE d1 <> d2
RETURN DISTINCT d2.node_name AS disease_name, d2.node_id AS disease_id

question: Which phenotypes are shared between 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome' and 'hereditary breast carcinoma'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)<-[:disease_phenotype_positive]-(d2:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'}) RETURN p.node_name AS shared_phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)<-[:disease_phenotype_positive]-(d2:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})
RETURN DISTINCT p.node_name AS phenotype

question: What is the node_source of the drug 'Cisplatin'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (dr:drug {node_name: 'Cisplatin'}) RETURN dr.node_source AS source
candidate_cypher: MATCH (d:drug {node_name: 'Cisplatin'}) RETURN d.node_source

question: List all exposures present in the graph.
gold_cypher: MATCH (e:exposure) RETURN e.node_name AS exposure ORDER BY e.node_name
candidate_cypher: MATCH (e:exposure) RETURN e.node_name, e.node_id

question: How many diseases exist in this sample graph?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease) RETURN count(d) AS total_diseases
candidate_cypher: MATCH (d:disease) RETURN count(d) AS disease_count

question: Which phenotypes are present in the disease 'hereditary breast carcinoma'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) RETURN p.node_name AS phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)
RETURN p.node_name AS phenotype_name, p.node_id, p.node_source, p.node_index

question: Return the node_id and node_index of the drug 'Doxorubicin'.
gold_cypher: MATCH (dr:drug {node_name: 'Doxorubicin'}) RETURN dr.node_id AS node_id, dr.node_index AS node_index
candidate_cypher: MATCH (d:drug {node_name: 'Doxorubicin'}) RETURN d.node_id, d.node_index

question: List all genes/proteins with node_source equal to 'NCBI' present in the sample.
gold_cypher: MATCH (gp:gene__protein {node_source: 'NCBI'}) RETURN gp.node_name AS gene_protein ORDER BY gp.node_name

question: List diseases whose names contain 'hereditary' and that have at least one associated phenotype.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) WHERE d.node_name CONTAINS 'hereditary' RETURN DISTINCT d.node_name AS disease, p.node_name AS phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)
WHERE toLower(d.node_name) CONTAINS 'hereditary'
RETURN DISTINCT d.node_name AS disease_name

question: For each phenotype, list all associated diseases and the total number of diseases per phenotype, sorted in descending order.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) RETURN p.node_name AS phenotype, collect(DISTINCT d.node_name) AS diseases, count(DISTINCT d) AS disease_count ORDER BY disease_count DESC
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (p:effect__phenotype)<-[:disease_phenotype_positive]-(d:disease)
WITH p.node_name AS phenotype, collect(d.node_name) AS diseases, count(d) AS disease_count
RETURN phenotype, diseases, disease_count
ORDER BY disease_count DESC

question: Find diseases that are exactly 2 hops away from 'Mendelian disease' via parent-child relationships, and return the full path.
gold_cypher: MATCH path = (root:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease]->(mid:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(leaf:disease) RETURN root.node_name AS root, mid.node_name AS intermediate, leaf.node_name AS leaf_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH p=(d1:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease*2]-(d2:disease)
RETURN p

question: Build a complete profile of the disease 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome': return all indicated, contraindicated, and off-label drugs, all phenotypes, the top 10 associated genes, and all linked exposures, in separate columns.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:indication]->(ind:drug) WITH d, collect(DISTINCT ind.node_name) AS indicated OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:contraindication]->(contra:drug) WITH d, indicated, collect(DISTINCT contra.node_name) AS contraindicated OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:off]->(off_dr:drug) WITH d, indicated, contraindicated, collect(DISTINCT off_dr.node_name) AS off_label OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) WITH d, indicated, contraindicated, off_label, collect(DISTINCT p.node_name) AS phenotypes OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_protein]->(gp:gene__protein) WITH d, indicated, contraindicated, off_label, phenotypes, collect(DISTINCT gp.node_name)[..10] AS top10_genes OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:exposure_disease]->(e:exposure) RETURN d.node_name AS disease, indicated, contraindicated, off_label, phenotypes, top10_genes, collect(DISTINCT e.node_name) AS exposures
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (drug:drug)-[i:indication]->(d)
WITH d,
     collect(CASE WHEN i.indication_type = 'indicated' THEN drug.node_name END) AS indicated_drugs,
     collect(CASE WHEN i.indication_type = 'contraindicated' THEN drug.node_name END) AS contraindicated_drugs,
     collect(CASE WHEN i.indication_type = 'off-label' THEN drug.node_name END) AS offlabel_drugs
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(ph:effect__phenotype)
WITH d, indicated_drugs, contraindicated_drugs, offlabel_drugs, collect(ph.node_name) AS phenotypes
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_protein]->(g:gene__protein)
WITH d, indicated_drugs, contraindicated_drugs, offlabel_drugs, phenotypes, g
ORDER BY g.node_index
WITH d, indicated_drugs, contraindicated_drugs, offlabel_drugs, phenotypes,
     collect(g.node_name)[0..10] AS top_genes
OPTIONAL MATCH (e:exposure)-[:exposure_disease]->(d)
RETURN indicated_drugs,
       contraindicated_drugs,
       offlabel_drugs,
       phenotypes,
       top_genes,
       collect(e.node_name) AS exposures

question: Which diseases have at least 2 different associated phenotypes? Return the disease name and the total number of phenotypes.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) WITH d, count(DISTINCT p) AS phenotype_count WHERE phenotype_count >= 2 RETURN d.node_name AS disease, phenotype_count ORDER BY phenotype_count DESC
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)
WITH d, count(DISTINCT p) AS phenotypeCount
WHERE phenotypeCount >= 2
RETURN d.node_name AS disease, phenotypeCount
ORDER BY phenotypeCount DESC

question: Which sibling diseases of 'hereditary breast carcinoma' exist — that is, diseases sharing the same parent disease?
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(target:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'}) MATCH (parent)-[:disease_disease]->(sibling:disease) WHERE sibling.node_name <> 'hereditary breast carcinoma' RETURN DISTINCT sibling.node_name AS sibling_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:disease_disease]-(parent)-[:disease_disease]-(sibling:disease)
WHERE sibling <> d
RETURN sibling.node_name AS sibling_disease, sibling.node_id, sibling.node_source, sibling.node_index

question: Find all disease→disease→disease paths (two parent-child hops) starting from 'breast neoplasm'. Return the three nodes in the path.
gold_cypher: MATCH (root:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease]->(mid:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(leaf:disease) RETURN root.node_name AS root, mid.node_name AS intermediate, leaf.node_name AS leaf_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease]->(d2:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(d3:disease)
RETURN d1, d2, d3

question: Find all diseases that have no associated gene/protein (isolated in terms of disease_protein).
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (d)-[:disease_protein]->(:gene__protein) } RETURN d.node_name AS disease ORDER BY d.node_name
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease)
WHERE NOT (d)-[:disease_protein]-()
RETURN d.node_name AS disease_name, d.node_id AS disease_id

question: Compute, by hierarchical level (depth 1 and depth 2 from 'Mendelian disease'), how many diseases exist at each level.
gold_cypher: MATCH (root:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease]->(level1:disease) WITH count(DISTINCT level1) AS level1_count MATCH (root2:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})-[:disease_disease]->(:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(level2:disease) RETURN level1_count, count(DISTINCT level2) AS level2_count
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (start:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})
WITH start
MATCH (start)-[:disease_disease*1..1]->(d1:disease)
WITH 1 AS depth, count(DISTINCT d1) AS cnt
UNION
MATCH (start:disease {node_name: 'Mendelian disease'})
MATCH (start)-[:disease_disease*2..2]->(d2:disease)
RETURN depth, cnt
ORDER BY depth;

question: Which phenotypes are associated with the child diseases of 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) RETURN child.node_name AS child_disease, p.node_name AS phenotype
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(ph:effect__phenotype)
RETURN DISTINCT ph.node_name AS phenotype_name

question: Which diseases are grandparents of 'hereditary breast carcinoma' via parent-child relationships?
gold_cypher: MATCH (grandparent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(parent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(target:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'}) RETURN DISTINCT grandparent.node_name AS grandparent_disease, parent.node_name AS parent_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (grandparent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(parent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(target:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})
RETURN grandparent.node_name AS grandparent_disease

question: Which diseases have as parent a disease whose name contains 'breast'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease) WHERE parent.node_name CONTAINS 'breast' RETURN parent.node_name AS parent_disease, child.node_name AS child_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (parent:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease)
WHERE parent.node_name CONTAINS 'breast'
RETURN child.node_name AS disease_name, child.node_id AS disease_id

question: Which diseases are grandchildren of 'breast neoplasm' (two parent-child hops)? Also return the intermediate disease.
gold_cypher: MATCH (root:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease]->(mid:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(leaf:disease) RETURN mid.node_name AS intermediate_disease, leaf.node_name AS grandchild_disease
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease]->(intermediate:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(grandchild:disease)
RETURN grandchild.node_name AS disease, intermediate.node_name AS intermediate_disease

question: For the disease 'hereditary breast carcinoma', how many of its associated genes are also found in the disease 'breast neoplasm'?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:disease_protein]->(gp:gene__protein) MATCH (d2:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_protein]->(gp) RETURN count(DISTINCT gp) AS shared_gene_count
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast carcinoma'})-[:disease_protein]->(g:gene__protein)
WITH collect(g) AS genes
MATCH (d2:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_protein]->(g)
WHERE g IN genes
RETURN count(DISTINCT g) AS common_gene_count

question: Which child diseases of 'breast neoplasm' also have their own child diseases (i.e., are also parent diseases)?
gold_cypher: MATCH (root:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease]->(mid:disease)-[:disease_disease]->(:disease) RETURN DISTINCT mid.node_name AS disease_with_children
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})<-[:disease_disease]-(child:disease)
WHERE (child)-[:disease_disease]->(:disease)
RETURN child.node_name, child.node_id

question: Find the shortest path between the node 'breast neoplasm' and the node 'autosomal dominant disease' using disease_disease relationships. Return the nodes in the path and its length.
gold_cypher: MATCH path = shortestPath((start:disease {node_name: 'breast neoplasm'})-[:disease_disease*]-(end:disease {node_name: 'autosomal dominant disease'})) RETURN [n IN nodes(path) | n.node_name] AS path_nodes, length(path) AS path_length

question: What is the total connectivity degree (in + out) of each node label? Return the label and the sum of all relationships.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n)-[r]-(m) RETURN labels(n)[0] AS node_label, count(r) AS total_connections ORDER BY total_connections DESC
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (n)
UNWIND labels(n) AS lbl
WITH lbl, size((n)--()) AS deg
RETURN lbl AS label, sum(deg) AS total_connectivity_degree;

question: For each child disease of 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome', return: name, number of genes, number of phenotypes, number of drugs of any type, and number of exposures.
gold_cypher: MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease) OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:disease_protein]->(gp:gene__protein) OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:indication|off|contraindication]->(dr:drug) OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:exposure_disease]->(e:exposure) RETURN child.node_name AS child_disease, count(DISTINCT gp) AS genes, count(DISTINCT p) AS phenotypes, count(DISTINCT dr) AS drugs, count(DISTINCT e) AS exposures ORDER BY genes DESC
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (parent:disease {node_name: 'hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome'})-[:disease_disease]->(child:disease)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:disease_protein]->(g:gene__protein)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)<-[:indication]-(d:drug)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)<-[:exposure_disease]-(e:exposure)
RETURN child.node_name AS disease_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT g) AS gene_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS phenotype_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d) AS drug_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT e) AS exposure_count;

question: What are the 5 most connected diseases in terms of distinct neighbors (unique nodes reachable by any relationship in 1 hop)?
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease)-[r]-(neighbor) WHERE neighbor.node_name IS NOT NULL RETURN d.node_name AS disease, count(DISTINCT neighbor.node_name) AS unique_neighbors ORDER BY unique_neighbors DESC LIMIT 5
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d:disease)-[r]-(n)
WITH d, count(DISTINCT n) AS neighborCount
RETURN d.node_name AS disease, neighborCount
ORDER BY neighborCount DESC
LIMIT 5

question: Build a complete comparative profile of the 3 main diseases: for each, return exclusive genes, genes shared with the other two, indicated drugs, off-label drugs, contraindicated drugs, phenotypes, and exposures — all in a single query using chained WITH.
gold_cypher: MATCH (d:disease) WHERE d.node_name IN ['hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome','hereditary breast carcinoma','breast neoplasm'] OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_protein]->(gp:gene__protein) WITH d, collect(DISTINCT gp.node_name) AS all_genes OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:indication]->(ind:drug) WITH d, all_genes, collect(DISTINCT ind.node_name) AS indicated OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:off]->(off_dr:drug) WITH d, all_genes, indicated, collect(DISTINCT off_dr.node_name) AS off_label OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:contraindication]->(contra:drug) WITH d, all_genes, indicated, off_label, collect(DISTINCT contra.node_name) AS contraindicated OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p:effect__phenotype) WITH d, all_genes, indicated, off_label, contraindicated, collect(DISTINCT p.node_name) AS phenotypes OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:exposure_disease]->(e:exposure) RETURN d.node_name AS disease, size(all_genes) AS total_genes, indicated, off_label, contraindicated, phenotypes, collect(DISTINCT e.node_name) AS exposures ORDER BY total_genes DESC
candidate_cypher:
MATCH (d1:disease {node_id: $d1}), (d2:disease {node_id: $d2}), (d3:disease {node_id: $d3})
WITH d1, d2, d3

// Genes per disease
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)-[:disease_protein]->(g1:gene__protein)
WITH d1, d2, d3, collect(g1.node_name) AS genes1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)-[:disease_protein]->(g2:gene__protein)
WITH d1, d2, d3, genes1, collect(g2.node_name) AS genes2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)-[:disease_protein]->(g3:gene__protein)
WITH d1, d2, d3, genes1, genes2, collect(g3.node_name) AS genes3

// Exclusive and shared genes
WITH d1, d2, d3,
     [g IN genes1 WHERE NOT g IN genes2 AND NOT g IN genes3] AS exclusive_genes1,
     [g IN genes2 WHERE NOT g IN genes1 AND NOT g IN genes3] AS exclusive_genes2,
     [g IN genes3 WHERE NOT g IN genes1 AND NOT g IN genes2] AS exclusive_genes3,
     [g IN genes1 WHERE g IN genes2 AND g IN genes3] AS shared_genes_all,
     [g IN genes1 WHERE g IN genes2 AND NOT g IN genes3] AS shared_genes12,
     [g IN genes1 WHERE g IN genes3 AND NOT g IN genes2] AS shared_genes13,
     [g IN genes2 WHERE g IN genes3 AND NOT g IN genes1] AS shared_genes23

// Indicated drugs
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)<-[:indication]-(dr1:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     collect(dr1.node_name) AS indicated_drugs1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)<-[:indication]-(dr2:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, collect(dr2.node_name) AS indicated_drugs2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)<-[:indication]-(dr3:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, collect(dr3.node_name) AS indicated_drugs3

// Off‑label drugs (drugs indicated for other diseases but linked to this disease via other relations, e.g., disease_disease)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)-[:disease_disease]-(other:disease)<-[:indication]-(off1:drug)
WHERE NOT (d1)<-[:indication]-(off1)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     collect(DISTINCT off1.node_name) AS offlabel_drugs1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)-[:disease_disease]-(other2:disease)<-[:indication]-(off2:drug)
WHERE NOT (d2)<-[:indication]-(off2)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, collect(DISTINCT off2.node_name) AS offlabel_drugs2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)-[:disease_disease]-(other3:disease)<-[:indication]-(off3:drug)
WHERE NOT (d3)<-[:indication]-(off3)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, collect(DISTINCT off3.node_name) AS offlabel_drugs3

// Contraindicated drugs (drugs linked via contraindication relationship, assuming such exists; using generic 'contraindication' rel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)<-[:contraindication]-(contra1:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     collect(contra1.node_name) AS contraindicated_drugs1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)<-[:contraindication]-(contra2:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, collect(contra2.node_name) AS contraindicated_drugs2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)<-[:contraindication]-(contra3:drug)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, collect(contra3.node_name) AS contraindicated_drugs3

// Phenotypes
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p1:effect__phenotype)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     collect(p1.node_name) AS phenotypes1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p2:effect__phenotype)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     phenotypes1, collect(p2.node_name) AS phenotypes2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)-[:disease_phenotype_positive]->(p3:effect__phenotype)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     phenotypes1, phenotypes2, collect(p3.node_name) AS phenotypes3

// Exposures
OPTIONAL MATCH (d1)-[:exposure_disease]->(e1:exposure)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     phenotypes1, phenotypes2, phenotypes3,
     collect(e1.node_name) AS exposures1
OPTIONAL MATCH (d2)-[:exposure_disease]->(e2:exposure)
WITH d1, d2, d3, exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     phenotypes1, phenotypes2, phenotypes3,
     exposures1, collect(e2.node_name) AS exposures2
OPTIONAL MATCH (d3)-[:exposure_disease]->(e3:exposure)
WITH d1, d2, d3,
     exclusive_genes1, exclusive_genes2, exclusive_genes3,
     shared_genes_all, shared_genes12, shared_genes13, shared_genes23,
     indicated_drugs1, indicated_drugs2, indicated_drugs3,
     offlabel_drugs1, offlabel_drugs2, offlabel_drugs3,
     contraindicated_drugs1, contraindicated_drugs2, contraindicated_drugs3,
     phenotypes1, phenotypes2, phenotypes3,
     exposures1, exposures2, collect(e3.node_name) AS exposures3

RETURN
 d1.node_name AS disease1,
 exclusive_genes1,
 shared_genes12 + shared_genes13 + shared_genes_all AS genes_shared_with_others1,
 indicated_drugs1,
 offlabel_drugs1,
 contraindicated_drugs1,
 phenotypes1,
 exposures1,
 d2.node_name AS disease2,
 exclusive_genes2,
 shared_genes12 + shared_genes23 + shared_genes_all AS genes_shared_with_others2,
 indicated_drugs2,
 offlabel_drugs2,
 contraindicated_drugs2,
 phenotypes2,
 exposures2,
 d3.node_name AS disease3,
 exclusive_genes3,
 shared_genes13 + shared_genes23 + shared_genes_all AS genes_shared_with_others3,
 indicated_drugs3,
 offlabel_drugs3,
 contraindicated_drugs3,
 phenotypes3,
 exposures3;
error: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.ParameterMissing} {message: Expected parameter(s): d1, d2, d3} {gql_status: 42001} {gql_status_description: error: syntax error or access rule violation - invalid syntax}
